MODULE: cosmos.core.agent_spawner
FILE: cosmos/core/agent_spawner.py (312 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Agent Spawner - Multi-instance parallel agent execution
Each bot can have multiple instances: one for chat, others for development tasks

CLASSES:
- TaskType(Enum)
- AgentInstance: A single instance of an agent working on a task
- AgentTask: A task to be executed by an agent instance
- AgentSpawner: Manages multiple instances of agents working in parallel.
- Chat instances stay 
  Methods: def spawn_instance(self, agent_name: str, task_type: TaskType, task_description: str) -> Optional[Ag
  Methods: def get_active_instances(self, agent_name: Optional[str]=None) -> list[AgentInstance]
  Methods: def complete_instance(self, instance_id: str, result: str)
  Methods: def add_task(self, task_type: TaskType, description: str, assigned_to: Optional[str]=None, priority:
  Methods: def share_discovery(self, agent_name: str, discovery: str)
  Methods: def propose_change(self, agent_name: str, file_path: str, description: str, code: str)
  Methods: def get_pending_tasks(self) -> list[AgentTask]
  Methods: def claim_task(self, task_id: str, agent_name: str) -> Optional[AgentTask]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_spawner() -> AgentSpawner
- def initialize_development_tasks()
